mapper.sql:
SELECT o.order_id AS orderId, CONCAT('ORD', LPAD(o.order_id, 6, '0')) AS orderNo, o.status AS orderStatus, o.merchant_id AS merchantId, o.rider_id AS riderId,
COALESCE(mi.store_name, su.real_name, su.username, '商家门店') AS storeName, COALESCE(mi.store_address, mi.store_name, su.real_name, su.username, '商家位置') AS storeAddress, mi.store_longitude AS startLongitude, mi.store_latitude AS startLatitude,
COALESCE(o.receiver_name, '用户') AS receiverName, COALESCE(o.receiver_phone, '') AS receiverPhone, COALESCE(o.receiver_address, o.address, '用户收货地址') AS receiverAddress, o.receiver_longitude AS endLongitude, o.receiver_latitude AS endLatitude
FROM delivery_order o LEFT JOIN merchant_info mi ON o.merchant_id = mi.merchant_id LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON o.merchant_id = su.user_id
mapper.select: WHERE o.status IN (2, 3) AND ( o.rider_id = #{riderId} OR o.rider_id IN ( SELECT ri.rider_id FROM rider_info ri WHERE ri.user_id = #{riderId} ) ) ORDER BY CASE WHEN o.status = 3 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, o.order_time DESC, o.order_id DESC LIMIT 1
